case_title: KEMPER INSURANCE COMPANY VS. DAN T. DUMONTET et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST M C. FRED FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-25-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-12-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LETICIA PEREZ. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
